summary: Crisp soundboard captures a fiery Philadelphia show with a massive “Stranger” and a huge Scarlet>Fire sequence.
review: The performance is hailed as one of the tour’s best, kicking off with an explosive “Stranger” and delivering a monster Scarlet>Fire that keeps the entire set smoking. The recording is described as crispy and fantastic, offering clear, high‑quality sound that lets the band’s energy shine through.

ai_rating.rationale: Reviews consistently praise both the musical performance (standout songs, high energy) and the audio quality (crisp, fantastic), yielding a strong combined rating despite one moderate‑star review.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Crisp, clear mix with no reported dropouts or muddiness; listeners note the sound is fantastic and “crispy”.

show_quality.setlist_flow: The band fires out of the gate, maintaining high energy throughout with seamless transitions, especially highlighted by the massive Scarlet>Fire sequence.
